name: Private Agent WeChat Bridge
description: Intercepts openclaw-weixin before_dispatch and forwards to Private AI Agent AgentCore

serverBaseUrl.description: Private AI Agent HTTP base URL, e.g. http://127.0.0.1:3000

bridgeToken.description: Must match server WECHAT_CLAW_BRIDGE_TOKEN when set

defaultActorId.description: userId/sessionId for AgentCore (same as Flutter USER_ID)
